mapper.select: select code_id, item_val, item_name, use_flag from cotdl.tbl_piicode order by code_id
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piicode (code_id, item_val, item_name, use_flag) values (#{code_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_val, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{use_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piicode (code_id, item_val, item_name, use_flag) values (#{code_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_val, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{use_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piicode where code_id= #{code_id} and item_val= #{item_val}
mapper.select:
select code_id, item_val, item_name, use_flag from cotdl.tbl_piicode
order by code_id limit #{offset}, #{amount}
